name: token-counter
title: Token Counter
description: Counts tokens in clipboard text locally
author: nocdn

commands.name: count-tokens-in-clipboard
commands.title: Count Tokens in Clipboard
commands.subtitle: Along with words, lines, characters
commands.description: Counts tokens in the current clipboard text using a local o200k_base tokenizer.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
